topic.title: Assignment 6 - Beautiful.ai Presenation & Updated Figma Board
topic.text:
Hi all,

Below is a link to yesterday's presentation outlining assignment 6. 

https://www.beautiful.ai/-OlBlfobvlRkfq5vVj1V/1

Updated class Figma board with Brand Pillar examples.

https://www.figma.com/board/OwpJvWBWyLokWBtEs2dEQt/NEU-INFO7375-Branding---AI?node-id=109-306&p=f&t=HbBugKFhEgz2jmih-0

Let me know if you can't get to it or have questions or concerns.

Thanks,

Nina
